title: Create: Origins (Forge)
description: Port of Create: Origins for Forge
body:
# Archived! I don't have time or motivation to maintain this for newer Create versions. You should be using Origins under Connector, anyhow!

A port of [Create Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-origins) for Origins (Forge)

Also has support for [Create: Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen)!

Allows Merlings and other origins using `origins:water_breathing` to use backtanks and diving helmets to breathe in air.

Also adds 2 new power types and powers: `createorigins:goggles` and `createorigins:girl_power`.
Goggles gives you Mechanical Sight, allowing you to see the goggles overlay even when you aren't wearing them.
Girl Power gives you the GIrl Power effect from Create: Estrogen, but permenantly.

Also fixes a bug with `origins:fall_immunity` not working when under the effects of Estrogen.
